# Get Anything Done — llms.txt

> A research framework for evaluating and evolving AI coding agents under measurable pressure. Everything in this site is backed by files in the repo at https://github.com/MagicbornStudios/get-anything-done. This file follows the llmstxt.org convention.

## Core thesis

- [Home](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/): Evaluate and evolve agents under measurable pressure
- [Methodology](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/methodology): How we score, what the rubric is, how rounds work
- [Glossary](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/glossary): Every domain term (CSH, freedom hypothesis, pressure, etc.)
- [Skeptic](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/skeptic): Devils-advocate critique of every hypothesis — read this first before trusting any number
- [Lineage](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/lineage): GSD → RepoPlanner → GAD

## Evaluation

- [Findings](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/findings): Per-round writeups
- [Rubric](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/rubric): Per-project scoring dimensions
- [Decisions](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/decisions): Every entry in DECISIONS.xml (84 decisions)
- [Questions](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/questions): Open research questions
- [Roadmap](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/roadmap): Round-by-round timeline with pressure progression
- [Data provenance](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/data): Where every number on the site comes from
- [Emergent](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/emergent): Compound-Skills Hypothesis evidence rollup

## Catalog

- [Skills](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/skills): 28 skills (some are emergent, agent-authored, excluded from default install)
- [Requirements](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/requirements): Every eval project's current REQUIREMENTS.xml
- [Playable archive](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/#play): Every scored build playable in-browser

## System

- [Contribute](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/contribute): Human-first workflow (clone → install → open in Claude → talk)
- [Security](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/security): Skill attack surfaces, mitigations, future certification model
- [Tasks](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/tasks): 155 entries in TASK-REGISTRY.xml
- [Phases](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/phases): 28 phases in ROADMAP.xml
- [Bugs](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/bugs): Observed across eval runs

## Machine-readable

- [llms-full.txt](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): Full text dump of skills, decisions, questions, bugs, glossary, requirements
- [api/docs.json](https://get-anything-done.vercel.app/api/docs.json): Structured JSON with everything above plus the search index

## Canonical repository

https://get-anything-done.vercel.app is a view. The source of truth is the git repository. Clone it:

```
git clone https://github.com/MagicbornStudios/get-anything-done
```
